objective: Review and merge PRs #187 and #189 into dev after adversarial sol subagent review. Work-phases: (1) adversarial review, (2) local verification, (3) merge execution.

workPhases.title: Adversarial sol review of PR #187 and #189

tasks.title: Dispatch sol explorer to review PR #187 (immutable SQLite)
Dispatch sol explorer to review PR #189 (Alibaba baseUrl)

workPhases.title: Local verification (tsc + tests with both PRs applied)

tasks.title: Fetch PR branches and apply changes locally
Run bun test on affected test files
PR #187 left unmerged — review feedback with fix suggestions posted

criteria.scenario: Both PRs pass adversarial review with PASS or GO-WITH-FIXES (blockers resolved)
criteria.expectedEvidence: Sol subagent verdict output for each PR
criteria.capturedEvidence: PR#187 Darwin FAIL (3 High: immutable-vs-live rebutted, macOS test fail accepted+verified 9p/1f, Windows ? accepted). PR#189 James FAIL (1 High: trust-boundary rebutted by qwen-cloud precedent). Main agent: #187 FAIL, #189 near-pass.

criteria.scenario: Local build and tests pass with both PRs applied
criteria.expectedEvidence: tsc --noEmit exit 0, bun test exit 0 on affected files
criteria.capturedEvidence: PR#189: 56 pass 0 fail 336 expect(). PR#187: 9 pass 1 fail (macOS WAL persistence byte mismatch Expected:12384 Received:45152).

criteria.expectedEvidence: gh pr merge output or merge commit SHA
